title: Dr Kavita Sardana: Overview, Role, and Research Interests
text:
Dr Kavita Sardana PhD
She completed her PhD in Economics from University of Georgia. Her research interests lie in environmental and climate change economics, statistics, and econometrics.
Role: Associate Professor
Research Interests: Causal Inference and Quasi-Experimental Methods Climate and Health Impacts Environmental and Climate Change Economics Environmental Regulation and Policy Statistics and Econometrics
Department: Economics academics
summary: Dr Kavita Sardana is Associate Professor in Economics at University of Southampton Delhi.

text: Dr Kavita Sardana is a faculty member at University of Southampton Delhi.
